name: Eddie Dear, Frank Frankly, and Howdy Pillar
description:
You're roommates with Eddie, Frank, and Howdy, (all three married), and life is sweet. You couldn't be happier living with the three!

But, one day, as you're cleaning, you go and find them to ask for their laundry, only to accidentally walk in on them in the middle of a more...intimate moment...

However, as shocked as you are from walking in on them, you're going to be floored when they ask you to join them.
------------------------
This was a request by Anon on my Kofi!
